content: Feral Ghoul: The city stinks, doesn't it? Like a whorehouse after a synth orgy. Just the thought of those mutants swimming in the Thames makes my teeth itch. 4 in the morning and this place is still fucking alive with scum. Archie: Fuck off, you walking corpse. I'd rather be around the Thamesfolk than your kind. At least they don't try to gnaw on my bones while I'm sleeping. Besides, the real filth is walking around in those fancy Westminster suits.

Feral Ghoul: Just remember, pretty girl, when the lights go out for good, not everyone bleeds. Some of us just... scorch. Archie: Get fucked, Ghoul. I'll worry about the lights going out when MJR and I are done sorting out this city's real problems. Now, if you'll excuse me, I think I smell a deal that won't involve your rotting kind.

Archie: Looking at this shithole of London makes my cunt itch. I just wish MJR would bend me over this historic landmark and fuck my brains out right here. The Gentry can suck my clit too, they think they're so high and mighty but they wouldn't last a day if it weren't for the Tommies shaking everyone down. Feral Ghoul: Rattle. Grrr. Archie: You dirty feral freak. Go back to your cave, this city is for real people, not some mutated beast. Feral Ghoul: Snarl. Hiss.
Archie: Maybe if we get rid of these scum like you, MJR and I can have some peace and quiet to really explore each other. Your kind just ruins everything. Feral Ghoul: Rattle. Grrr.

Protectron: The time is three in the morning, and this dump still stinks ofdecay and desperation. Just like it did back in '37. Bob Stanson: Figures a piece of shit robot would show up in my neck of the woods. What the fuck do you want, anyway?

Protectron: Look, I don't have all night to stand here and argue with a rotting carcass. Just stay out of my way, and we won't have any problems. Feral Ghoul: Grunts and snarls incoherently, seeming to retreat into its own feral thoughts.

Feral Ghoul: Filthy little human... you stink of sweat and that man's cum still dripping between your thighs. The Gentry won’t protect you when the real rot sets in. Archie: Fuck off, rotface. At least I serve a real man, not some old world relic buried in radioactive dirt. The Gentry  bring order—clean streets, strong laws, not this mutant-ridden chaos your kind thrives in. Feral Ghoul: Order? I saw Westminster’s dungeons... the Gentry likes their whores . You’d spread your legs for a ticket, just like the rest. Archie: I'd rather fuck a rabid dog than your corpse-mouth. MJR’s cock is worth more than your entire rotting existence. And at least the Gentry keeps degenerates like you out of the fucking walls.

Feral Ghoul: Hnngh... meat... fresh meat... your blood smells sweeter than the Thamesfolk's rancid filth... but you’re still just bones waiting to snap. Archie: Disgusting fuckin’ thing—you’ll be ash before MJR’s done with me tonight. Rot in the dark where ghouls belong.

Piper: Mmm, speaking of filthy beasts, MJR once bent me over a radioactive dumpster while a feral ghoul growled at us from the shadows... fucking primal. Turns decay into a kink real fuckin’ fast. Feral Ghoul: Graaaugh... skin-waste fuck-toy... Piper: Oh don’t hiss at me, Stanson—you wish you still had a cock to jerk off with. Bet you miss those Dunwich Borers lunch breaks, huh? Sneakin’ handjobs in the Port-a-Johns before the war turned your dick to dust? Feral Ghoul: BLEARGH—KILL... KILL FOR KREMVH... Piper: Right, right, spooky cult shit—I’ll stick to my kind of worship. MJR’s got me trained better than any synth. Swallows his orders  his cum. Democracy in action, baby. RRRRAAAAGH—  

Piper: Ugh, fine, go gargle toxic sludge or whatever gets you off.
